subtasks.goal: Research top attractions in Kyoto for a 3-day trip.
subtasks.capsule: This agent identifies key cultural and scenic sites in Kyoto, categorized by area (e.g., Eastern, Western, Northern) to facilitate logical grouping. It serves the ROOT GOAL by providing the primary content for the itinerary.

outputs.description: A list of recommended attractions with locations, estimated visit times, and brief descriptions.

subtasks.goal: Research highly-rated restaurants in Kyoto near major attractions.
subtasks.capsule: This agent finds dining options suitable for lunch and dinner, focusing on proximity to the attractions identified by root.1. It serves the ROOT GOAL by ensuring the itinerary includes practical and enjoyable meal stops.

outputs.description: A list of recommended restaurants with cuisine type, location, price range, and proximity to major sites.

subtasks.goal: Research transport options in Kyoto for tourists.
subtasks.capsule: This agent details the best ways to get around Kyoto, including buses, trains, and walking routes between key areas. It serves the ROOT GOAL by providing the logistical framework to connect the attractions and restaurants.

outputs.description: A guide to Kyoto's transport system, including key lines, pass recommendations, and travel times between major districts.

subtasks.goal: Assemble the 3-day Kyoto itinerary using research from root.1, root.2, and root.3.
subtasks.capsule: This agent synthesizes the attraction, restaurant, and transport data into a coherent day-by-day schedule. It serves the ROOT GOAL by producing the final deliverable: a practical and enjoyable 3-day plan.

outputs.description: A detailed 3-day itinerary including morning/afternoon/evening activities, meal suggestions, and transport instructions.
